untranslatable_reason: Signal requires decomposition of volatility into fundamental vs. transitory components. The allowed indicator set (hvol_20, atr_20, bb_bandwidth) can approximate transitory volatility detection via spread widening and volatility magnitude, but cannot directly measure the 55% transitory volatility threshold as a proportion of total volatility. Order flow imbalance detection also requires order book data not available in the standard OHLCV indicator set.
translation_notes: Approximated transitory volatility magnitude using hvol_20 (historical volatility 20-period) as a proxy for total volatility spike, and bb_bandwidth expansion as a proxy for bid-ask spread deterioration. Position sizing multiplier (2.0x per vol unit) captured in stop_loss_pct. A precise implementation would require custom volatility decomposition indicators not in the allowed set.
